---
title: "ENV 710 Initial Figures"
author: "S. Slay, E. Miles-Flynn, & Y.E. Su"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document

---

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(plotly)
library(here)
# Set global options for R chunks
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, 
                      message = FALSE, 
                      warning = FALSE)

data_2025 <- read.csv(here("Data/SlaySMilesFlynnESuEData_Final_2025.csv"))

plot_ly(data=data_2025, z=~Dissolved.Oxygen, x=~Total.Phosphorus, y=~Organic.Carbon, 
        color=~Watershed, opacity=0.6) %>%
  add_markers()

```
